theme.modeTip: Light, Auto (follows the operating system), or Dark.

inputMode.mouseTip: Wheel zooms; drag to orbit and pan.

colorPicker.saveSwatchTip: Save this color to the project palette.
colorPicker.removeSwatchTip: Remove this color from the palette.

graph.noGroupGraph: The VFX group has no graph - select an emitter or VFX mesh
graph.addAttributeTip: Declare a new attribute on this sink.
graph.focusErrorNodeTip: Frame this node in the graph.

preview.enabledTip: Toggle this light on or off.
preview.gridTip: Show or hide the ground grid.
preview.playerFigureTip: Show or hide the reference figure for scale.
preview.globalTip: Constrain the transform to the world axes.
preview.localTip: Constrain the transform to the object's own axes.
preview.snapTip: Snap increment applied while dragging the gizmo.
preview.renderBackendBaselineTip: WebGL1-compatible rendering - previews what an older device will show.
preview.renderBackendStandardTip: WebGL2 rendering - previews what a modern device will show.

viewport.addEmitterTip: Add a new emitter to the scene.
viewport.addMeshTip: Add a VFX mesh (a plain mesh with a material) to the scene.

stats.title: Stats
stats.costTip: This node's approximate ALU cost - higher runs more expensive.
stats.graphCostTip: This graph's approximate ALU cost - higher runs more expensive.

transport.jumpToStartTip: Move the playhead to the beginning of the timeline.
transport.stepBackTip: Move the playhead back one frame.
transport.stepForwardTip: Move the playhead forward one frame.
transport.restartOnRebuildTip: Replay the effect from the start on every graph change.
transport.fpsTip: Frames per second for this timeline's playback and keyframe snapping - not the effect's own particle simulation rate.
transport.durationTip: Total length of the timeline, in seconds.

timeline.frameTip: The frame this item sits on.
timeline.countTip: How many particles the burst spawns.
timeline.durationTip: How long the emission lasts (0 = infinite).
timeline.infinitePlayOnTip: Play forever - the duration field is held at 0 while this is on.
timeline.infinitePlayOffTip: Turn off to give this play a finite duration.
timeline.valueTip: The keyframed value at this frame.
timeline.addBurstTip: Emit a one-shot burst of particles at the playhead.
timeline.addPlayTip: Start a sustained emission at the playhead.
timeline.addKeyTip: Insert a keyframe on this channel at the playhead.
timeline.removeEmitterTip: Delete this emitter and all its tracks.
timeline.hideObjectTip: Hide this object in the preview and outline. Editor-only - it still exports.
timeline.showObjectTip: Show this object in the preview and outline.
timeline.markFakeTip: Keep this track's keyframes in the editor only; the exported effect drives it through its live-update API instead.
timeline.unmarkFakeTip: Bake this track's keyframes into the exported effect.
timeline.fakeLockedTip: The VFX group's own transform is always excluded from the export - the consumer poses the exported effect directly.

content.title: CONTENT
content.uploadTip: Add images, HDRIs or GLB meshes to the library.
content.deleteAssetTip: Remove this asset from the library.
content.applyPresetTip: Replace the current project with this preset. You can still undo this.
content.embedAssetsTip: Inline asset data into the exported TypeScript instead of referencing files.
content.helpIntroGraphs: {behavior} shapes how particles spawn and move; {render} shapes how they are drawn.
content.helpIntroTiers: {baseline} targets WebGL1; {standard} targets WebGL2 and unlocks more nodes.
content.helpIntroUndo: Every change here (uploads, presets, renames) is undoable like any other edit.
content.helpMiscCountdown: Buttons like Delete or Load need several clicks in a row to confirm; each click counts down, and leaving one idle reverts it to its original icon.
content.helpMiscTooltips: Hover almost any control in the editor to see a tooltip explaining what it does.
content.helpMiscCost: The Cost / Effect cost numbers are an approximate ALU cost, summed per node - higher runs more expensive, not a literal frame-time number.

curve.toggleTip: Toggle smooth / sharp (or double-click the point)
curve.normalizeTip: Rescale the value range back to 0..1 (keeps the shape)
